common.browseByCategoryDesc: Find your perfect transfer by browsing airports, cities, countries and services.

home.heroSubtitle: Door-to-door airport transfers in 100+ destinations. Fixed prices, meet & greet, 24/7 support.
home.whyChooseSubtitle: Door-to-door private transfers tailored to every journey. Fixed prices, professional drivers and 24/7 support — wherever you go.
home.servicesSubtitle: Door-to-door private transfers tailored to every journey. Fixed prices, professional drivers and 24/7 support — wherever you go.
home.airportTransfersDesc: Seamless door-to-door transfers from 120+ airports worldwide. Meet & greet with flight monitoring included.
home.portTransfersDesc: Comfortable transfers to and from major cruise ports. Your driver meets you right at the terminal.
home.trainTransfersDesc: Reliable pre-booked transfers from major train stations. Fixed price, hassle-free, always on time.
home.cityToCityDesc: Private intercity transfers between major cities. Comfortable vehicles for longer journeys.
home.step1Desc: Choose your route, select your vehicle, and book in minutes.
home.step2Desc: Your driver will be waiting with a name sign at the arrival hall.
home.step3Desc: Sit back and relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle.
home.coverageDesc: From major airports to hidden gems, we cover transfers across Europe, Americas, Asia and beyond.
home.popularDestinationsDesc: Trusted by thousands of travellers across the world's most visited cities.
home.ctaDesc: Get an instant quote with fixed prices, meet & greet, and free cancellation up to 24 hours before your trip.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Book your private transfer in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your route, select your vehicle, and confirm your booking in minutes. Instant confirmation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your professional driver waits at the arrivals hall with a name sign. We monitor your flight in real time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Door-to-door service at a fixed, pre-agreed price.

fleet.title: Our fleet
fleet.subtitle: Modern vehicles for every need — from solo travellers to large groups.
fleet.economyDesc: Comfortable sedan ideal for couples and solo travellers. Perfect for city transfers.
fleet.comfortDesc: Premium-feel sedan with extra legroom and amenities. Ideal for business travellers.
fleet.minivanDesc: Spacious vehicle for families and small groups. Plenty of room for luggage.
fleet.mpvDesc: Large MPV for groups up to 7 with generous luggage space. Great for airport runs.
fleet.premiumSedanDesc: Mercedes-Benz S-Class for executive and VIP transfers. Top comfort and discretion.
fleet.luxurySedanDesc: Mercedes-Benz E-Class with premium finishes. Refined choice for business and leisure.
fleet.premiumVanDesc: Mercedes-Benz V-Class for groups who want premium comfort. Up to 6 passengers.

airport.transferBestPrice: Transfer from {airport} to the city centre at the best price
airport.transferBestPriceDesc: Book your private transfer from {airport} to the city centre with fixed prices and no surprises. Our professional drivers meet you with a name sign at the arrivals terminal and take you directly to your destination door-to-door.
airport.pricesAndRates: Private transfers at {airport}: Prices and rates
airport.pricesAndRatesDesc: Our rates are fixed and transparent, with no hidden charges or luggage supplements. Check the exact price of your transfer instantly using our booking form.
airport.vehiclesDesc: We have a wide fleet to suit any need. From sedans for business travel to MPVs and minibuses for families and groups.
airport.privateCarDesc: Comfortable sedan, ideal for couples and business travellers. Space for 2-3 suitcases.
airport.mpvDesc: Spacious vehicle perfect for families with children or medium groups. Capacity for 4-6 suitcases.
airport.executive: VIP Transfer in luxury Mercedes Class vehicle
airport.executiveDesc: Premium service in high-end Mercedes-Benz vehicles. Exclusive experience for executives and VIP travellers.
airport.minibusDesc: Ideal solution for large groups, conventions and events. Ample luggage space.
airport.additionalServices: Additional services available when booking your private transfer at {airport}
airport.childSeats: Child seats and baby safety seats for your private transfers at {airport}
airport.childSeatsDesc: We provide child seats (group 0+, 1, 2 and 3) and approved booster seats completely free of charge on request. Simply indicate it when making your booking and your driver will have it installed in the vehicle.
airport.ourDriversDesc: All our drivers are licensed professionals who know the area and have proven experience. They speak English and Spanish, and will greet you with a smile and a name sign in the arrivals hall.
airport.lowCostDesc: We offer affordable transfers without sacrificing quality or safety. Our prices are competitive versus regular taxis, with the advantage of a fixed price agreed before you leave home.
airport.vipTransfer: {city} VIP Transfer in luxury Mercedes Class vehicle
airport.vipTransferDesc: For those seeking the ultimate exclusivity, our VIP service includes Mercedes-Benz E-Class or S-Class vehicles, bottled water, onboard WiFi and a bilingual suited driver. Perfect for executives, celebrities and special occasions.
airport.portTransfer: Transfer from {airport} to the cruise port from 25 euros
airport.portTransferDesc: We connect the airport with the {city} Cruise Port. A fast, direct journey so you don't miss a minute of your cruise. Fixed price with no surprises.
airport.flightDelay: Flight delayed? Your private taxi at {airport} will wait for you
airport.flightDelayDesc: We monitor all flights in real time. If your plane is delayed, your driver will automatically adjust the pickup time at no extra cost. You will never be left without transport.
airport.testimonialsDesc: Thousands of satisfied customers endorse our service. With a 4.8/5 rating based on over 2,500 reviews, we are the trusted choice for transfers at {airport}.
airport.joinDrivers: Are you a professional driver operating private transport at {airport}?
airport.joinDriversDesc: Join our network of professional drivers. We offer competitive conditions, a steady flow of bookings and full support. Contact us for more information.
airport.faqVipQ: Can I book Premium and VIP vehicles for my transfers at {airport}?
airport.faqVipA: Yes, we have Mercedes-Benz E-Class and S-Class vehicles for our VIP service. You can select them during the booking process.
airport.faqMercedesQ: Do you have Mercedes taxis in {city}?
airport.faqMercedesA: Yes, our fleet includes Mercedes-Benz vehicles for executive and VIP services. You can request one when making your booking.
airport.faqChildSeatsQ: Do you provide child seats for all your transfer services at {airport}?
airport.faqChildSeatsA: Yes, we provide approved child seats (group 0+, 1, 2 and 3) completely free of charge. Just indicate it when booking.
airport.faqVipServiceQ: Do you offer special executive and VIP transfers in luxury vehicles in {city}?
airport.faqVipServiceA: Yes, we offer a premium VIP service with high-end Mercedes vehicles, a bilingual suited driver and extras such as water and onboard WiFi.
airport.faqLargeGroupQ: Can I book large taxis for up to 8 people for my transfers at {airport}?
airport.faqLargeGroupA: Absolutely. We have MPVs for up to 6 passengers and minibuses for up to 16 passengers for large groups.
airport.faqPetsQ: Do you accept pets in your taxi and transfer bookings at {airport}?
airport.faqPetsA: Yes, we accept pets in our vehicles. We ask that you indicate this when booking so the driver is prepared.
airport.faqLicensedQ: Are transfers in {city} operated by licensed drivers?
airport.faqLicensedA: All our drivers hold a valid VTC licence, professional insurance and vehicles with current MOT. Your safety is our priority.
airport.faqServicesQ: What types of services can I book at {airport}?
airport.faqServicesA: We offer city centre transfers, hotel transfers, cruise port transfers, intercity transfers, VIP service, event service and group transport.
airport.faqWheelchairQ: Do you have wheelchair-accessible vehicles at {airport}?
airport.faqWheelchairA: Yes, we have adapted vehicles for passengers with reduced mobility. Indicate this when booking and we will assign the appropriate vehicle.
airport.faqDelayQ: What happens if my flight at {airport} is delayed?
airport.faqDelayA: We monitor all flights in real time. If your flight is delayed, we automatically adjust the pickup time at no extra cost.

faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our transfer services.

about.title: About Titan Transfers
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for private transfers worldwide.

footer.description: Titan Transfers provides premium private transfer services worldwide. Airport transfers, port transfers, and city-to-city transport with fixed prices and 24/7 support.
